name: Mushroom Pouch
text: At the start of your Beginning Phase, if you control a facedown card at a battlefield, draw 1.

name: Portal Rescue
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Banish a friendly unit, then its owner plays it to their base, ignoring its cost.

name: Ravenbloom Student
text: When you play a spell, give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Retreat
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Return a friendly unit to its owner's hand. Its owner channels 1 rune exhausted.

name: Singularity
text: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

name: Sprite Mother
text: When you play me, play a ready 3 :rb_might: Sprite unit token with [Temporary] here. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)

name: Ava Achiever
text: When I attack, you may pay :rb_rune_mind: to play a card with [Hidden] from your hand, ignoring its cost. If it’s a unit, play it here.

name: Convergent Mutation
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Choose a friendly unit. This turn, increase its Might to the Might of another friendly unit.

name: Dr. Mundo - Expert
text: My Might is increased by the number of cards in your trash.At the start of your Beginning Phase, recycle 3 from your trash.

name: Ekko - Recurrent
text: [Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)[Deathknell] — Recycle me to ready your runes. (When I die, get the effect.)

name: Heimerdinger - Inventor
text: I have all :rb_exhaust: abilities of all friendly legends, units, and gear.

name: Kai'Sa - Evolutionary
text: [Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)When I conquer, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost less than your points without paying its Energy cost. Then recycle it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

name: Malzahar - Fanatic
text: Kill a friendly unit or gear, :rb_exhaust:: [Action] — [Add] :rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow:. (Use on your turn or in showdowns. Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Progress Day
text: Draw 4.

name: Promising Future
text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, banishes one of them, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.)

name: Thousand-Tailed Watcher
text: [Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)When you play me, give enemy units -3 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

name: Viktor - Innovator
text: When you play a card on an opponent's turn, play a 1 :rb_might: Recruit unit token in your base.

name: Wraith of Echoes
text: The first time a friendly unit dies each turn, draw 1.

name: Ahri - Inquisitive
text: When I attack or defend, give an enemy unit here -2 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

name: Seal of Insight
text: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_mind:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Teemo - Strategist
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)When I defend, choose an enemy unit here and reveal the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. Deal 1 to that unit for each card with [Hidden] revealed this way, then recycle the revealed cards.

name: Time Warp
text: Take a turn after this one. Banish this.

name: Unchecked Power
text: Exhaust all friendly units, then deal 12 to ALL units at battlefields.

name: Arena Bar
text: :rb_exhaust:: Buff an exhausted friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Bilgewater Bully
text: While I'm buffed, I have [Ganking]. (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)

name: Cannon Barrage
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Deal 2 to all enemy units in combat.

name: Challenge
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Choose a friendly unit and an enemy unit. They deal damage equal to their Mights to each other.

name: Confront
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Units you play this turn enter ready. Draw 1.

name: Crackshot Corsair
text: When I attack, deal 1 to an enemy unit here.

name: Dune Drake
text: When I attack, give me +2 :rb_might: this turn if there is a ready enemy unit here.

name: First Mate
text: When you play me, ready another unit.

name: Flurry of Blades
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Deal 1 to all units at battlefields.

name: Mobilize
text: Channel 1 rune exhausted. If you can't, draw 1.

name: Pakaa Cub
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)

name: Pit Rookie
text: When you play me, buff another friendly unit. (If it doesn't have a buff, it gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Stormclaw Ursine
text: [Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)When you play me, channel 1 rune exhausted.

name: Catalyst of Aeons
text: Channel 2 runes exhausted. If you couldn't channel 2 runes this way, draw 1.

name: Cithria of Cloudfield
text: When you play another unit, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Herald of Scales
text: Your Dragons' Energy costs are reduced by :rb_energy_2:, to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:.

name: Kinkou Monk
text: When you play me, buff up to two other friendly units. (Each one that doesn't have a buff gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Pirate's Haven
text: When you ready a friendly unit, give it +1 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Spoils of War
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)If an enemy unit has died this turn, this costs :rb_energy_2: less.Draw 2.

name: Unyielding Spirit
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Prevent all spell and ability damage this turn.

name: Wallop
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)As you play this, you may spend a buff as an additional cost. If you do, ignore this spell's cost.Ready a unit.

name: Wildclaw Shaman
text: When you play me, you may spend a buff to buff me and ready me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Anivia - Primal
text: When I attack, deal 3 to all enemy units here.

name: Carnivorous Snapvine
text: When you play me, choose an enemy unit at a battlefield. We deal damage equal to our Mights to each other.

name: Kraken Hunter
text: [Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_body: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)[Assault] (+1 :rb_might: while I'm an attacker.)As you play me, you may spend any number of buffs as an additional cost. Reduce my cost by :rb_rune_body: for each buff you spend.
